assertions.name: C: retry cycle — outcome=resolved (2nd attempt with valid PIN)
C: failed attempt PIN '000000' absent from pipeline_state (maskedScope cleared on rewind)
C: successful attempt PIN '123456' absent from pipeline_state (masked, not written to output)
C: validacao_pin.valid=true — 2nd attempt PIN correctly forwarded to invoke
C: auth_status.status=ok — end_transaction completed after retry
